fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies a series of dates according to the selected time interval.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total capacity for the corresponding time period.

fields.name: Qty. on Order (Job)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of measuring units allocated to projects with the status order.

fields.name: Availability After Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies capacity minus the quantity on order.

fields.name: Job Quotes Allocation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of measuring units allocated to projects with the status quote.

fields.name: Availability After Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies capacity, minus quantity on order (Project), minus quantity on service order, minus project quotes allocation.

fields.name: Qty. on Service Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are allocated to service orders, meaning listed on outstanding service order lines.

fields.name: Qty. on Assembly Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item are allocated to assembly orders, which is how many are listed on outstanding assembly order headers.

fields.name: Net Availability
fields.tooltip: Specifies capacity, minus the quantity on order, minus the projects quotes allocation.
